author: y4rr
content: Observation: folder.rs line 43-45 defines IMG_EXTENSIONS = ['jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'ppm', 'bmp', 'pgm', 'tif', 'tiff', 'webp'] — 9 entries. torchvision 0.21.x datasets/folder.py IMG_EXTENSIONS = ('.jpg', '.jpeg', '.png', '.ppm', '.bmp', '.pgm', '.tif', '.tiff', '.webp') — identical set (ferrotorch drops the leading dot since has_extension_ci compares to path.extension()). No code change needed.
